sentences.target: Mir läuft eine Träne über die Wange.
sentences.reading: /miːɐ̯ lɔʏft ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtrɛːnə ˈyːbɐ diː ˈvaŋə/

translations.de: Mir läuft eine Träne über die Wange.
translations.ipa: /miːɐ̯ lɔʏft ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtrɛːnə ˈyːbɐ diː ˈvaŋə/
translations.en: A tear runs down my cheek.
translations.es: Me corre una lágrima por la mejilla.
translations.fr: Une larme me coule sur la joue.
translations.it: Una lacrima mi scende sulla guancia.
translations.zh-Hans: 一滴泪顺着我的脸颊滑落。
translations.yue: 有一滴眼淚沿住我臉頰滑落。
translations.pt: Uma lágrima escorre pela minha bochecha.
translations.vi: Một giọt nước mắt lăn trên má tôi.
translations.nl: Een traan rolt over mijn wang.
translations.hi: मेरे गाल पर एक आँसू लुढ़क रहा है।
translations.el: Ένα δάκρυ κυλά στο μάγουλό μου.
translations.nb: En tåre renner nedover kinnet mitt.
translations.id: Setetes air mata mengalir di pipiku.
translations.sv: En tår rinner nerför min kind.
translations.ro: O lacrimă îmi alunecă pe obraz.
translations.da: En tåre løber ned ad min kind.
translations.ja: 涙が頬を伝って流れ落ちる。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular dative personal pronoun; dative experiencer/possessor in this intransitive construction.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; agrees with the subject ‘eine Träne’.
Indefinite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject ‘Träne’.
Noun, feminine, nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Preposition governing accusative (direction); introduces path PP ‘über die Wange’.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of ‘Wange’ as object of ‘über’.
Noun, feminine, accusative singular; object of the preposition ‘über’.

sentences.target: Er wischt die Träne mit dem Ärmel ab.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ vɪʃt diː ˈtrɛːnə mɪt deːm ˈɛʁməl ap/

translations.de: Er wischt die Träne mit dem Ärmel ab.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ vɪʃt diː ˈtrɛːnə mɪt deːm ˈɛʁməl ap/
translations.en: He wipes the tear with his sleeve.
translations.es: Se limpia la lágrima con la manga.
translations.fr: Il essuie la larme avec sa manche.
translations.it: Si asciuga la lacrima con la manica.
translations.pt: Ele enxuga a lágrima com a manga.
translations.vi: Anh ấy lau nước mắt bằng tay áo.
translations.nl: Hij veegt de traan weg met zijn mouw.
translations.hu: A könnyét a ruhaujjával törli le.
translations.hi: वह अपनी आस्तीन से आँसू पोंछता है।
translations.el: Σκουπίζει το δάκρυ με το μανίκι του.
translations.id: Dia menghapus air mata dengan lengan bajunya.
translations.sv: Han torkar bort tåren med ärmen.
translations.da: Han tørrer tåren væk med ærmet.

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; main verb of separable verb ‘abwischen’ (particle appears as ‘ab’).
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object ‘Träne’.
Noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition governing dative; introduces instrumental PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Ärmel’ (object of ‘mit’).
Noun, masculine, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘mit’ (instrument).
Separable verbal particle; combines with ‘wischen’ to form ‘abwischen’ (‘wipe off’).

sentences.target: Ich sehe eine Träne in deinem Auge.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzeːə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtrɛːnə ɪn ˈdaɪ̯nəm ˈaʊ̯ɡə/

translations.de: Ich sehe eine Träne in deinem Auge.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzeːə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtrɛːnə ɪn ˈdaɪ̯nəm ˈaʊ̯ɡə/
translations.en: I see a tear in your eye.
translations.es: Veo una lágrima en tu ojo.
translations.fr: Je vois une larme dans ton œil.
translations.it: Vedo una lacrima nei tuoi occhi.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看到你眼里有一滴泪。
translations.yue: 我見到你眼入面有一滴眼淚。
translations.ru: Я вижу слезу в твоём глазу.
translations.pt: Vejo uma lágrima no seu olho.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy một giọt nước mắt trong mắt bạn.
translations.nl: Ik zie een traan in je oog.
translations.uk: Я бачу сльозу в твоєму оці.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी आँख में एक आँसू दिख रहा है।
translations.el: Βλέπω ένα δάκρυ στο μάτι σου.
translations.nb: Jeg ser en tåre i øyet ditt.
translations.id: Aku melihat setetes air mata di matamu.
translations.sv: Jag ser en tår i ditt öga.
translations.ro: Văd o lacrimă în ochiul tău.
translations.da: Jeg ser en tåre i dit øje.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; transitive.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of the direct object ‘Träne’.
Noun, feminine, accusative singular; direct object.
Preposition governing dative (static location); introduces locative PP.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; dative neuter singular; modifies ‘Auge’.
Noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘in’.

sentences.target: Die Träne glitzert im Licht der Lampe.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈtrɛːnə ˈɡlɪtsɐt ɪm lɪçt deːɐ̯ ˈlampə/

translations.de: Die Träne glitzert im Licht der Lampe.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈtrɛːnə ˈɡlɪtsɐt ɪm lɪçt deːɐ̯ ˈlampə/
translations.en: The tear sparkles in the lamp light.
translations.es: La lágrima brilla a la luz de la lámpara.
translations.fr: La larme scintille à la lumière de la lampe.
translations.it: La lacrima brilla alla luce della lampada.
translations.yue: 嗰滴眼淚喺燈光底下閃閃發亮。
translations.pt: A lágrima brilha sob a luz da lâmpada.
translations.vi: Giọt nước mắt lấp lánh dưới ánh đèn.
translations.nl: De traan glinstert in het lamplicht.
translations.hi: लैंप की रोशनी में आँसू चमकता है।
translations.el: Το δάκρυ λαμπυρίζει στο φως της λάμπας.
translations.id: Air mata berkilau di bawah cahaya lampu.
translations.cs: Slza se třpytí ve cvetлe lampy.
translations.ja: 涙がランプの光にきらめく。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject ‘Träne’.
Noun, feminine, nominative singular; grammatical subject.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; intransitive.
Contraction of ‘in dem’; preposition governing dative; introduces PP ‘im Licht’.
Noun, neuter, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘im’.
Definite article, genitive feminine singular; determiner of ‘Lampe’ in a genitive NP modifying ‘Licht’.
Noun, feminine, genitive singular; genitive modifier (possessor) of ‘Licht’.
